recommendations.title: Werckmeister Harmonies
recommendations.overview: A naive young man witnesses an escalation of violence in his small hometown following the arrival of a mysterious circus attraction.

recommendations.title: The Turin Horse
recommendations.overview: A monumental windstorm and an abused horse's refusal to work or eat signal the beginning of the end for a poor farmer and his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Man from London
recommendations.overview: A switchman at a seaside railway witnesses a murder but does not report it after he finds a suitcase full of money at the scene of the crime.

recommendations.title: Damnation
recommendations.overview: Karrer plods his way through life in quiet desperation. His environment is drab and rainy and muddy. Eaten up with solitude, his hopelessness would be incurable but for the existence of the Titanik Bar and its beautiful, haunting singer. But the lady

recommendations.title: Wild Strawberries
recommendations.overview: Crotchety retired doctor Isak Borg travels from Stockholm to Lund, Sweden, with his pregnant and unhappy daughter-in-law, Marianne, in order to receive an honorary degree from his alma mater. Along the way, they encounter a series of hitchhikers, eac

recommendations.title: The Wicker Man
recommendations.overview: Police sergeant Neil Howie is called to an island village in search of a missing girl whom the locals claim never existed. The investigation is further complicated as Howie’s religious views clash with those of the island’s residents.

recommendations.title: The Day Shall Come
recommendations.overview: An impoverished leader of a small religious commune in Miami is offered cash to save his family from eviction. He has no idea his sponsor works for an FBI agent, who plans to turn him into a criminal by fueling his madcap revolutionary dreams.

recommendations.title: The Naked Island
recommendations.overview: A family of four are the sole inhabitants of a small island, where they struggle each day to irrigate their crops.

recommendations.title: Suite Française
recommendations.overview: France, 1940. In the first days of occupation, beautiful Lucile Angellier is trapped in a stifled existence with her controlling mother-in-law as they both await news of her husband: a prisoner of war. Parisian refugees start to pour into their small

recommendations.title: The African Doctor
